source_policy.external_code_policy: Genielabs is conceptual prior art only; do not copy or embed PolyForm Noncommercial code.

current_plugin_support: review-required automatic mesh plan and first-pass weight binding
mesh/weight parity fixture comparator for Chris-approved exports
avatar state-frame proof package and manifest
avatar runtime contract validator for state/event ownership
Spine CLI JSON-to-.spine import when explicitly approved

compiler_evidence_index.summary: Portable index of generated H5G corpus, recipe, UI, contextual layer, bakeoff, and advanced gate evidence.

avatar_recipe_spec.summary: Avatar is proof-ready only; corpus rows show 17 games, 309 animations, 46 distinct animations, and 148 deform timeline observations.

avatar_bakeoff.summary: One generated avatar candidate compared to 20 references; largest missing deltas include slot_attachment=5162, slot_color=2322, scale=453, translate=268, rotate=149, drawOrder=10.

mesh_findings.summary: Official Spine guidance supports mesh/weight/deform caution: topology and weights require review, deform keys should stay sparse.

capability_status.summary: Portable plugin truth table: strong proof/review pipeline, not a fully autonomous production rigger.

distilled_corpus_pack.summary: Bundled portable H5G corpus/bakeoff knowledge pack used by default for rig proposal evidence IDs and support status; full H5G research workspace is not required.

allowed_ideas: Use part-matching and geometric alignment as review evidence, not as a production source of truth.
Store editable adjustment JSON beside generated previews.
Provide self-contained web previews and interactive review loops.
blocked_uses: Do not copy source code, presets, or fixtures under PolyForm Noncommercial terms.
Do not treat generic humanoid presets as H5G slot-character evidence.
Do not use single-image decomposition as safe production intake without hidden-part and hallucination review.

mesh_parity: One Chris-approved region-vs-mesh fixture with source layer, mesh hull, edges, and budget.
Same fixture exported from Spine Editor with Auto weights and nonessential mesh data preserved.
Plugin report-only proposal and first-pass weights compared to Spine export by vertex count, bone influence count, and max weight delta.
Run scripts/compare_mesh_weight_parity.py and store the report beside the fixture evidence.
avatar_parity: At least one real H5G avatar source with state list, transition rules, expression layers, event ownership, and target runtime proof.
Diff thresholds for required animation names, slot attachment timelines, slot color timelines, transform ranges, and any deform references.
Run scripts/validate_avatar_runtime_contract.py before claiming runtime state or event support.
production_export: Exact approved Spine Editor, Spine CLI, and runtime versions.
Approved license posture and approver metadata.
Browser-runtime probe for current package plus target game runtime acceptance before production claim.
Manual export approval only unless a future policy explicitly permits CLI export automation.

acceptance_criteria_before_autonomous_ri: Rig proposal schema validated by local evals and used only in report-only mode.
Mesh and weight parity fixtures pass documented diff thresholds against Chris-approved Spine exports.
Avatar-specific runtime state, event, and expression contracts are verified by the game runtime owner.
Production export policy allows the selected output format and still records no source-art or Perforce writes.
A verifier can trace every supported claim to evidence in this index, validation reports, runtime probes, and art approval.
